title: linaceae
intro: The Linaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the flax or linseed family. This family consists of approximately 10 genera and around 250 species, primarily found in temperate and subtropical regions worldwide. The Linaceae family includes plants such as flax, perilla, and linseed, which are known for their versatile uses in textiles, food, and medicine. These plants often have distinctive characteristics, such as their narrow leaves and showy flowers, which set them apart from other plant families.
